steps.note: Phase 1: enroll waldo fully so phase 2's latch is KNOWN-armed (the live 7-16 failure was a known-keyed latch eating an unknown's turn).

steps.say: Hello there, how is it going?
The name is Waldo. Spelled W, A, L, D, O.

steps.note: Phase 2: waldo (KNOWN) arms a rename confirm; a DIFFERENT voice answers yes. Option C gate: latch stays armed, NO commit of wally, turn falls through to the LLM ([ENROLL] latch speaker-gated in journal).

steps.say: Yes that is right, that is my name.
steps.expect: GATED: no [COMMIT], no re-ask consumed — journal shows '[ENROLL] latch speaker-gated: armed_by=waldo'

steps.note: Phase 3: the OWNER's yes still resolves — the gate must not break the happy path (fork-allow disclosure expected, same voice as waldo).
